ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Type of work class the employee belongs to */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight used in population estimation */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the employee */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the employee */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race of the employee (encoded) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the employee (encoded) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the employee */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the employee */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the employee */,
  "income_level" INTEGER /* Income level (binary: 0 for <=50K, 1 for >50K) */,
  "education_cat_level" INTEGER /* Categorical education level */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for termination (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved by the applicant */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills possessed by the applicant (comma-separated) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of work experience */,
  "resume_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the applicant's resume */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., job board, referral) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, rejected, hired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES applicant_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee's next review period */,
  "development_plan" TEXT /* Development plan for the employee's growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "duration_weeks" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in weeks */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer leading the program */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for attending the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee enrolled in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the program was completed (if applicable) */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the program by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose salary is recorded */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus (if applicable) */,
  "benefits_value" REAL /* Value of benefits (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefits */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the employee has health insurance (true/false) */,
  "retirement_plan" INTEGER /* Whether the employee has a retirement plan (true/false) */,
  "vacation_days" INTEGER /* Number of vacation days available per year */,
  "paid_holidays" INTEGER /* Number of paid holidays per year */,
  "life_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the employee has life insurance (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_diversity" (
  "diversity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for diversity metrics */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being assessed */,
  "diversity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of diverse employees in the department */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of female employees in the department */,
  "ethnicity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of ethnic minorities in the department */,
  "disability_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of employees with disabilities in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diversity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the employee data */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Admin) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant source (e.g., job board, referral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the applicant source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., leadership, technical skills) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)
